entity_proposals.description: A class representing various types of norms used in numerical methods to measure the size or distance of mathematical objects.
entity_proposals.justification: This new class is necessary to encompass the concept of norms, including energy norm and its variants, which are not adequately covered by existing classes like MathematicalObject or NumericalConcept, ensuring a more precise categorization within the numerical methods ontology.

members.name: energy norm
sources: A First Course in Numerical Methods – Ascher & Greif_chunk_94.7

entity_proposals.description: A class representing properties and structures of matrices relevant to numerical methods, including symmetric positive definite matrices, orthogonal matrices, and related concepts.
entity_proposals.justification: This new class is necessary to encapsulate the various matrix properties and structures identified in the cluster, which are not fully covered by existing classes like 'MatrixConcept', ensuring a comprehensive representation of matrix-related properties in numerical methods.
